title: CT-Derived Colonoscopy Coverage Ground-Truth Benchmark
description: Code for a multi-geometry CT-derived colonoscopy surface-coverage benchmark: a fly-through coverage ground-truth engine, a patient-level split generator, and an independent coverage-MAE leaderboard recount. The coverage ground truth is a geometric surface-visibility fraction derived from public HQColon CT colon segmentations and is not redistributed here; the derived data are released as a separate deposit.
